game.title.description: Name of the Daily Word game card.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Daily Word game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Daily Word play button.

keyboard.delete.description: Delete key label on the on-screen keyboard.

keyboard.submit.description: Submit/Enter key label on the on-screen keyboard.

win.title.description: Header shown when the player wins.

win.guesses_one.description: Singular form: number of guesses used (only 1 guess).

win.guesses_other.description: Plural form: number of guesses used.

win.share.description: Button label to share the result.

loss.title.description: Header shown when the player loses (exhausted all 6 guesses).

loss.answer.description: Reveals the correct word to the player after a loss.
loss.answer.notes: {{word}} is the correct answer string — do not translate it.

loss.nextWord.description: Label before the HH:MM:SS countdown to midnight.
loss.nextWord.notes: Followed by a live countdown timer (e.g., 'Next word in 08:42:11').

error.loadFailed.description: Error shown when today's puzzle cannot be fetched from the server.

error.guessFailed.description: Error shown when submitting a guess fails (network error).

error.invalidWord.description: Toast shown when the submitted word is not in the word list.

error.tooShort.description: Toast shown when the player tries to submit before filling all tiles.
